mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification n WHERE n.user_id = #{userId}
AND COALESCE(n.destination_platform, 'ALL') IN ('ALL', #{platform})

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification n WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.is_read = 0
AND COALESCE(n.destination_platform, 'ALL') IN ('ALL', #{platform})
SELECT n.*, a.name AS actor_name, a.status AS actor_status FROM notification n LEFT JOIN users a ON n.actor_id = a.id WHERE n.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, read_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_read = 0

UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, read_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
AND COALESCE(destination_platform, 'ALL') IN ('ALL', #{platform})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, actor_id, type, target_type, target_id, sender_relation, destination_platform, title, message, link) SELECT recipient.id, #{actorId}, #{type}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{senderRelation}, COALESCE(#{destinationPlatform}, 'ALL'), #{title}, #{message}, #{link} FROM users recipient WHERE recipient.id = #{userId} AND recipient.status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT role FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
